hypothesis: K_avg ~2.2 at N=662. Expert-swarm still FRAGMENT (K<1.0). Regression model R²>0.70.
method: nk_null_model.py + domain-level citation breakdown + hub analysis
key_findings: L-601 (structural enforcement theorem) overtook L-001 (genesis) as #1 hub at L-700
Hub succession ratio 1.61x — L-601 gained 17 citations in 62 lessons post-crossover
Expert-swarm domain exited FRAGMENT (0.25→1.50) — structural change, not cosmetic
Hub z jumped from 5.9 (S355) to 14.2 — driven entirely by L-601 accumulation
Isolation z became HIGHLY SIGNIFICANT (3.4) for first time — uncited lessons increasingly anomalous
interpretation: L-601 becoming the top hub is self-referentially coherent: the lesson that says 'structural enforcement beats voluntary compliance' is itself structurally enforcing its own relevance by being the most cited reference for subsequent findings. The hub succession from L-001→L-601 marks a transition from genesis-anchoring to principle-anchoring in the citation network.
